name: Great Gryzmon

signature_move.name: Tōkonsō
signature_move.description: Tears the enemy to pieces with its flaming claws.

description: Calling itself the strongest martial artist in the Digital World , it is a Digimon whose motto is to "entertain spectators above all in battle". Its performance in combat captivates the surrounding Digimon watching on, livening up the battlefield. It is also a hard worker that always trains so that it can live up to its audience's expectations. In addition, a match against Pile Volcamon , who is considered to be its eternal rival, is a big event that draws in many spectators. Its Special Moves are tearing the enemy to pieces with its flaming claws ( Tōkonsō ), and igniting the poison mist it spews from its mouth to trigger an explosion ( Bakugiri ). Finally, the most popular bold move among its audience is " GGS ", in which it strikes the opponent with a sonic lariat in a special ring it summons from the earth.
